patch.value: Lower Sentry tracesSampleRate from 1.0 to 0.2 for free plan quota

Reduced tracesSampleRate in src/core/sentry/instrument.ts from 1.0 to 0.2. At 1.0, every trace was sent which rapidly exhausts free plan quota. At 0.2, we still get representative sampling while staying within limits.

author: audit-agent
